/// Standard Neural Network Layers.

use crate::autodiff::{Variable, MatMul};
use fusion_core::types::tensor::{Tensor, Matrix};

pub trait Layer {
    fn forward(&self, input: Variable) -> Variable;
    fn parameters(&self) -> Vec<Variable>;
}

pub struct Linear {
    weights: Variable,
    bias: Option<Variable>,
}

impl Linear {
    pub fn new(in_features: usize, out_features: usize) -> Self {
        // Initialize weights (Random initialization ideally)
        let w_data = Tensor::ones([in_features, out_features]); 
        
        Self {
            weights: Variable::new(w_data),
            bias: None, // Simplified
        }
    }
}

impl Layer for Linear {
    fn forward(&self, input: Variable) -> Variable {
        MatMul::apply(input, self.weights.clone())
    }

    fn parameters(&self) -> Vec<Variable> {
        vec![self.weights.clone()]
    }
}
